id.description:
Internal TzKT id (not the same as `tokenId`).  
**[sortable]**

tokenId.description:
Token id, unique within the contract.  
**[sortable]**

firstLevel.description:
Level of the block where the token was first seen.  
**[sortable]**

firstTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the token was first seen.

lastLevel.description:
Level of the block where the token was last seen.  
**[sortable]**

lastTime.description: Timestamp of the block where the token was last seen.

balancesCount.description:
Total number of holders ever seen.  
**[sortable]**

totalMinted.description: Total number of minted tokens (raw value, not divided by `decimals`).

totalBurned.description: Total number of burned tokens (raw value, not divided by `decimals`).

totalSupply.description: Total number of existing tokens (raw value, not divided by `decimals`).
